channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly Tipping Darenth Road happens on a regular basis., 24th March

item.title: Usual place at 208 kings ground, 24th March
item.description:

item.title: Pothole getting bigger by the day, 24th March

item.title: Large pothole on high road, 24th March
item.description:
Large pothole on high road, full resurfacing work happened there just 1 year ago and missed this bit by 10m . Could you please fix this as it is on main road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1051, High Road, Whetstone, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stanford Hill N16 bench areas outside Lidl, 24th March
item.description:
Cardboard boxes need to cleared also pallets of wood by bin area. Litter in general.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stamford Hill, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish in trees, 24th March
item.description:
Two trees immediately outside the Tavern Quay have had bins bags stuck in them for more than two weeks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rope Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
